items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #3' requires confirmation of the scenario behavior regarding graceful degradation when the agent is confused. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that directly addresses this scenario or its expected outcomes. The linked use case and prior steps do not contain sufficient information to validate the expected result, leading to an inconclusive status.
